violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Good Humor reach-in-freezer needs cleaned of debris.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Both Microwaves were not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles need replaced.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Cloth curtains being used as a shelf/storage cover. Make sure to use materials that are smooth, easily cleanable, and nonabsorbent.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Provide proper test papers for sanitizer solutions. Need test papers to monitor sanitizer concentrations.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and ceilings must be non-absorbent and in good repair. Clean ceiling, vents, box fan, ceiling fan, A/C unit, etc. Repair holes in ceiling close to pizza oven vent.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Insecticides and any other toxic materials must be moved away from cleaning agents on a separate shelf. - Fly bait cannot be used inside. - Follow all labels on insect sprays - Cover all food areas, clean and sanitize after use.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
